rollVersatile.name: Roll Versatile Damage
rollVersatile.hint: Hold this key while clicking an activity to roll versatile damage instead of base damage.

ackModeToggle.name: Toggle Acknowledged Mode
ackModeToggle.hint: Pause chat auto-scroll and step through new messages one at a time.

settings.enableRollModel.name: Enable: Roll Model
settings.enableRollModel.hint: Enable the Roll Model submodule (D&D 5e roll overhaul, multi-roll display, damage buttons). Requires a reload.
settings.enableActiveAuras.name: Enable: Active Auras
settings.enableActiveAuras.hint: Enable the Active Auras submodule (automatically applies effects to tokens within aura range). Requires a reload.
settings.enableOverrideSettings.name: Enable: Override Settings
settings.enableOverrideSettings.hint: Enable the Override Settings submodule (auto-applies world and client settings from settings.json on load). Requires a reload.
settings.enableSuppressWarnings.name: Enable: Suppress Warnings
settings.enableSuppressWarnings.hint: Enable the Suppress Warnings submodule (filters configured console warnings and errors). Requires a reload.
settings.enableGridAwareAuras.name: Enable: Grid-Aware Auras
settings.enableGridAwareAuras.hint: Enable the Grid-Aware Auras submodule (draw grid-accurate aura shapes on tokens with configurable effects and automation). Requires a reload.
settings.enableEffectMacro.name: Enable: EffectMacro
settings.enableEffectMacro.hint: Enable the EffectMacro submodule (run macros from active effects on various triggers). Requires a reload.
settings.acknowledgedMode.name: Acknowledged Mode
settings.acknowledgedMode.hint: Track damage acknowledgment on chat cards from player-owned actors. The GM can manually acknowledge a card; players applying damage also stamp the card with the affected target names. Both show a green badge visible to all.
settings.preventMovementHistory.name: Prevent Movement History
settings.preventMovementHistory.hint: Prevent tokens from recording movement history. Requires a reload.
settings.showTurnStartMarker.name: Show Turn-Start Position
settings.showTurnStartMarker.hint: Highlight the cell a token occupied at the start of their turn with a blue overlay.
settings.enableCharacterFeatures.name: Enable: Character Features
settings.enableCharacterFeatures.hint: Enable the Character Features submodule (PC-specific automation such as wild shape effect toggling). Requires a reload.

buttons.repeat: Click to repeat the quick roll.

error.incorrectTargetState: Cannot ugprade a roll to target state '{state}' because it is not a valid state (advantage or disadvantage).
error.rollIsNullOrUndefined: The given roll is null or undefined.
error.termIsNullOrUndefined: The given term is null or undefined.
error.applyDamageNoPermission: You do not have permission to apply damage from this message.
error.applyDamageNoTokens: You have no tokens selected or targeted to apply damage to.

warning.emptyDamageField: One or more damage fields on this item are empty! To roll damage, ensure all damage fields are filled.
